g.title: acq.user_request:lineitem->acq.lineitem:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (lineitem) REFERENCES acq.lineitem(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

g.title: acq.user_request:eg_bib->biblio.record_entry:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (eg_bib) REFERENCES biblio.record_entry(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

g.title: acq.user_request:cancel_reason->acq.cancel_reason:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (cancel_reason) REFERENCES acq.cancel_reason(id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED
